title: Event.jar remake
description: This is a arthouse where  scary entities appear and events. Arthouse.
body:
Event.jar Remake is a fan-made reimagining of the classic Aware and Conscious.jar mod. It recreates the eerie, unpredictable atmosphere of the original while introducing new pixel-style entities and simplified textures for a more retro, less realistic look.

This mod adds several unique entities with their own behaviors and interactions:
- Meetboy — a fast-moving entity who roams the world peacefully until provoked. Once attacked, he will chase and counter-attack.
- G0d — a mysterious being that appears when you strike a hammer against certain objects. Be ready to run if you summon its attention.
- The Seeker — capable of climbing up to 255 blocks high.
- Other entities, such as The Watcher, who eerily appears and watches you from a distance.
  
Players who enjoyed Aware and Conscious.jar will appreciate this remake’s nostalgic pixel-art style and fresh entity mechanics.

**Key Features:**

Simplified, pixel-based visuals (no PNG realism). (no pngs but the 3d entities may be relistic.)

Dynamic entities that react to player actions.

A mysterious world full of unexpected events and hidden behaviors.

**Important Note:**
This mod is an independent fan-made remake and is not affiliated with the original Aware and Conscious.jar or Event.jar projects.
